course.name: Fundamental Nursing Skills and Concepts - New Cohort

lessons.title: Course Overview and WK Product Setup
lessons.content:
A 12-week practical nursing fundamentals course based on Wolters Kluwer CoursePoint for Timby's Fundamental Nursing Skills and Concepts, 13th edition, with vSim for LPN/LVN and Lippincott Client Cases for Clinical Judgment.

Required products: CoursePoint, vSim for LPN/LVN, and Lippincott Client Cases for Clinical Judgment. Students should complete WK Student Strategies training and confirm access to CoursePoint resources before Week 1.

lessons.title: Grading, Mastery, and Remediation Expectations
lessons.content: Class preparation is 120 points, class follow-up is 180 points, clinical preparation/performance is 350 points, summative exams are 350 points, and clinical performance is pass/fail. PrepU pre-class work targets ML 4; post-class work targets ML 6 with remediation.

modules.title: Week 1: Nursing Foundations; Health and Illness; Homeostasis, Adaptation, and Stress

lessons.title: Classroom Focus
lessons.content:
CoursePoint chapters 1, 4, 5

Nursing Foundations; Health and Illness; Homeostasis, Adaptation, and Stress

Pre-class: Student Strategies training certificate, One-Minute Nurse quizzes at 80% average, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/post-class: CoursePoint orientation, CJMM prompts, Stop/Think/Respond and critical thinking discussion questions.

lessons.title: Clinical Skills Lab
lessons.content:
Orientation; Nursing Foundations; Health and Illness; Homeostasis, Adaptation, and Stress

CoursePoint clinical activity orientation, Practice & Learn, vSim, Lippincott Client Cases, Neil O'Leary case, Client Cases second attempt.

Clinical points for this week: 0.

modules.title: Week 2: Nursing Process and Clinical Judgment; Asepsis; Infection Control

lessons.title: Classroom Focus
lessons.content:
CoursePoint chapters 2, 10, 22

Nursing Process and Clinical Judgment; Asepsis; Infection Control

Pre-class: One-Minute Nurse quizzes, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, care-plan orientation, Opal Warfell C. difficile case, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

lessons.title: Clinical Skills Lab
lessons.content:
Nursing Process and Clinical Judgment; Asepsis; Infection Control

Hand hygiene, sterile field, sterile gloves, PPE, Jared Griffin vSim, Luisa Montessori MRSA case, infection-risk care plan.

Clinical points for this week: 30.

modules.title: Week 3: Comfort, Rest, and Sleep; Safety; Pain Management

lessons.title: Classroom Focus
lessons.content:
CoursePoint chapters 18, 19, 20

Comfort, Rest, and Sleep; Safety; Pain Management

Pre-class: One-Minute Nurse quizzes, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, pain and safety case discussions, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

lessons.title: Clinical Skills Lab
lessons.content:
Comfort, Rest, and Sleep; Safety; Pain Management

Occupied/unoccupied bed, back massage, restraints, TENS unit, pain and fall-risk Client Cases, acute pain care plan.

Clinical points for this week: 23.

modules.title: Week 4: Vital Signs; Physical Assessment; Special Examinations and Tests

lessons.title: Classroom Focus
lessons.content:
CoursePoint chapters 12, 13, 14

Vital Signs; Physical Assessment; Special Examinations and Tests

Pre-class: Concepts in Action, One-Minute Nurse quizzes, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, assessment case discussions, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

lessons.title: Clinical Skills Lab
lessons.content:
Vital Signs; Physical Assessment; Special Examinations and Tests

Vital signs, physical assessment, glucometer use, Vernon Russell vSim, blood glucose and orthostatic hypotension cases.

Clinical points for this week: 40.

modules.title: Week 5: Nutrition; Fluid and Chemical Balance; Hygiene

lessons.title: Classroom Focus
lessons.content:
CoursePoint chapters 15, 16, 17 plus chapter 9 review in lab

Nutrition; Fluid and Chemical Balance; Hygiene

Pre-class: One-Minute Nurse quizzes, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, dehydration Client Cases, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

lessons.title: Clinical Skills Lab
lessons.content:
Nutrition; Fluid and Chemical Balance; Hygiene

Meal trays, feeding, intake/output, bathing, perineal care, oral care, hair care, dehydration care plan.

Clinical points for this week: 23.

modules.title: Week 6: Body Mechanics, Positioning, and Moving; Fitness and Therapeutic Exercise; Mechanical Immobilization; Ambulatory Aids

lessons.title: Classroom Focus
lessons.content:
CoursePoint chapters 23, 24, 25, 26

Body Mechanics, Positioning, and Moving; Fitness and Therapeutic Exercise; Mechanical Immobilization; Ambulatory Aids

Pre-class: PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, mobility case discussions, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

lessons.title: Clinical Skills Lab
lessons.content:
Body Mechanics, Positioning, and Moving; Fitness and Therapeutic Exercise; Mechanical Immobilization; Ambulatory Aids

Turning, transfers, range-of-motion exercises, cast care, arm sling, crutches, canes, walkers, fall-risk care plan.

Clinical points for this week: 23.

modules.title: Week 7: Midterm Summative Exam; Recording and Reporting; Urinary Elimination; Bowel Elimination

lessons.title: Classroom Focus
lessons.content:
CoursePoint chapters 9, 30, 31

Midterm Summative Exam; Recording and Reporting; Urinary Elimination; Bowel Elimination

Pre-class: One-Minute Nurse SBAR quiz, documentation article, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/post-class: Midterm, pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, documentation discussion, elimination Client Cases, PrepU to ML 6.

lessons.title: Clinical Skills Lab
lessons.content:
Urinary Elimination; Bowel Elimination; Recording and Reporting

Charting, bedpan/urinal, catheterization, Foley irrigation, Kim Johnson and Marvin Hayes vSim, urinary retention care plan.

Clinical points for this week: 35.

modules.title: Week 8: Perioperative Care; Wound Care; Gastrointestinal Intubation

lessons.title: Classroom Focus
lessons.content:
CoursePoint chapters 27, 28, 29

Perioperative Care; Wound Care; Gastrointestinal Intubation

Pre-class: Concepts in Action, One-Minute Nurse pressure injury quiz, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, perioperative/wound case discussions, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

lessons.title: Clinical Skills Lab
lessons.content:
Perioperative Care; Wound Care; Gastrointestinal Intubation

Antiembolism stockings, pneumatic compression, sterile dressing, wound irrigation, NG tube, Josephine Morrow vSim.

Clinical points for this week: 35.

lessons.title: Classroom Focus
lessons.content:
CoursePoint chapters 21, 36

Oxygenation; Airway Management; Resuscitation

Pre-class: Concepts in Action, One-Minute Nurse oxygen delivery quiz, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, respiratory Client Cases, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

lessons.title: Clinical Skills Lab
lessons.content:
Oxygenation; Airway Management

Oxygen assessment, oxygen administration, suctioning, tracheostomy care, oxygen via nasal cannula case, airway care plans.

Clinical points for this week: 38.

lessons.title: Classroom Focus
lessons.content:
CoursePoint chapters 32, 33, 34

Oral Medications; Topical and Inhalant Medications; Parenteral Medications

Pre-class: Concepts in Action, One-Minute Nurse medication quizzes, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, medication route and dosage case, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

lessons.title: Clinical Skills Lab
lessons.content:
Oral Medications; Topical and Inhalant Medications; Parenteral Medications

Oral, enteral, topical, eye, ear, nasal, subcutaneous, intramuscular medication skills; polypharmacy/safety care plan.

Clinical points for this week: 23.

modules.title: Week 11: Culture and Ethnicity; Nurse-Client Relationship; Client Teaching; Admission, Discharge, Transfer, and Referrals

lessons.title: Classroom Focus
lessons.content:
CoursePoint chapters 6, 7, 8, 11

Culture and Ethnicity; Nurse-Client Relationship; Client Teaching; Admission, Discharge, Transfer, and Referrals

Pre-class: PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, health education and culture Client Cases, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

lessons.title: Clinical Skills Lab
lessons.content:
Culture and Ethnicity; Nurse-Client Relationship; Client Teaching; Admission, Discharge, Transfer, and Referrals; End-of-Life Care

Therapeutic communication, discharge teaching plan, end-of-life and postmortem care, health maintenance care plan.

modules.title: Week 12: Law and Ethics; End-of-Life Care

lessons.title: Classroom Focus
lessons.content:
CoursePoint chapters 3, 38 and review of all prior chapters

Law and Ethics; End-of-Life Care

Pre-class: One-Minute Nurse delegation and end-of-life quizzes, PrepU adaptive quizzes to ML 4.

During/post-class: Pre-lecture quiz, CJMM prompts, end-of-life Client Cases, PrepU to ML 6 with remediation.

lessons.title: Clinical Skills Lab
lessons.content:
Comprehensive Skills Performance Review

Comprehensive skills stations and skills performance evaluation across previously learned skills.

Clinical points for this week: 60.

modules.title: Final Exam and Skills Performance Assessment

lessons.title: Cumulative Final Exam
lessons.content: Cumulative final exam aligned to all course objectives and weekly CoursePoint chapter outcomes.

lessons.title: Skills Performance Assessment
lessons.content: Students demonstrate competency in all previously learned skills, including infection control, safety, vital signs, assessment, ADLs, mobility, elimination, oxygenation, airway management, medication administration, wound care, and documentation.

notes: Replace COURSE_ID in HTML after the Canvas course is created.
Add Wolters Kluwer LTI/external tool launch links from the institution's WK integration.
Apply calendar dates after the new cohort start date is confirmed.
